div.div:
Parse & Persist Flags
clean temp state
persist config to disk
pin batch_size (default 5)
determine mode A/B/C

Batch YAML
(Mode A)
read YAML input file
pre-allocate N IDs
launch N agents in parallel

retry any missing

/rfe.auto-fix
re-read config + IDs from disk
assess, review, auto-revise
split oversized RFEs
retry queue + report
pass --batch-size from config
